projects.title: Copilot Studio AI Agents for Security & Operations
projects.summary: Deployed custom AI agents in Copilot Studio for service desk triage, security alert classification, QA automation, and policy lookup. Each agent operates under HIPAA-aligned governance — Purview DLP on prompts, Conditional Access on agent surfaces, full audit logging through Sentinel.

projects.title: 42 CFR Part 2 Compliance Program
projects.summary: Built and shipped the organization's 42 CFR Part 2 compliance program ahead of the February 2026 enforcement deadline — covering substance use disorder record confidentiality, consent management, segregation of regulated records, and breach notification obligations newly aligned with HITECH.

projects.title: Microsoft Purview DLP — Full Enterprise Deployment
projects.summary: Deployed Microsoft Purview DLP across every M365 workload — Teams, Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, and endpoint. PHI pattern detection blocks exfiltration at the edge while routing alerts into Sentinel for unified incident response. HITECH breach notification thresholds monitored automatically.

projects.title: Microsoft Teams Rooms & IoT Device Program
projects.summary: Deployed and governed Microsoft Teams Rooms infrastructure across all facilities and brought the broader IoT estate under management — Intune enrolled, segmented onto a dedicated IoT VLAN, monitored through Sentinel. Shadow IoT eliminated.

projects.title: CIS Controls v8 — Full Program Build from Zero
projects.summary: Built the organization's compliance program from nothing — full CIS Controls v8 implementation across all 18 domains, crosswalked to the HIPAA Security Rule, audited 100% pass, and architected for HITRUST CSF readiness.

projects.title: DMP Entré Access Control & Ubiquiti Camera Systems
projects.summary: Built enterprise physical security from zero — DMP Entré access control across all facilities and Ubiquiti UniFi camera coverage at every entry point. Physical and logical access events now flow into the same audit trail under unified identity.

projects.title: Website Overhaul — WordPress to Webflow
projects.summary: Replaced a decade-old WordPress site with a Webflow rebuild — modern, responsive, WCAG-compliant, integrated with HubSpot CRM for newsletter and lead capture and Google Analytics for traffic visibility. Eliminated a long-standing security and maintenance liability.

projects.title: HubSpot CMS & Bereavement Program Digitization
projects.summary: Replaced the paper-based bereavement outreach program with a fully digital HubSpot deployment — CMS, Marketing Hub, and CRM. Automated enrollment, segmented journeys, and analytics across every touchpoint that previously generated zero data.

projects.title: Mosai (Forcura) & Mosai Circle — Intake & Order Management
projects.summary: Deployed Mosai (formerly Forcura) for clinical intake and order management across field and office staff, plus Mosai Circle for inter-organizational physician and facility eSignatures. Eliminated paper-based intake and accelerated order turnaround for every referring physician partner.

projects.title: Anti-Phishing & Anti-Impersonation Program
projects.summary: Eliminated domain spoofing across all organization email by enforcing DMARC, DKIM, and SPF in concert with Defender for Office 365 anti-phishing and anti-impersonation policies. PHI exfiltration via mail blocked at the gateway and reinforced by Purview DLP.

projects.title: Employee Onboarding Program from Scratch
projects.summary: Built the organization's first structured onboarding program — fully automated endpoint provisioning via Autopilot, day-one security awareness training, and identity lifecycle management through Entra ID. New hires are productive and compliant before IT lifts a finger.

projects.title: Tenable Vulnerability Management Program
projects.summary: Stood up continuous vulnerability management with Tenable.io from zero — scan-to-ticket workflow, severity-based remediation SLAs, and Sentinel integration for correlated risk scoring. Drove a 78% reduction in critical and high-severity findings within the first six months.

projects.title: Microsoft Sentinel from Zero
projects.summary: Stood up the organization's first SIEM from absolute zero — Microsoft Sentinel with custom KQL detection rules, 12+ data connectors, and Logic Apps playbooks for automated response. Replaced isolated alerts with unified, correlated visibility.

projects.title: Autopilot & Intune Full Endpoint Standardization
projects.summary: Standardized the entire device fleet on Microsoft Autopilot and Intune — new hardware ships zero-touch from the OEM, existing devices enrolled into Intune MDM for unified management and compliance reporting. Eliminated manual imaging and brought every endpoint under a single policy framework.

outcomes.label: Provisioning
outcomes.context: No IT intervention for new hardware

projects.title: Jira, JSM, Confluence & Trello — First ITSM Program
projects.summary: Stood up the organization's first formal ticketing and ITSM platform — Jira Service Management with service catalogs and SLAs, Jira for project work, Confluence for knowledge, Trello for lighter team workflows. ITIL-aligned without being ITIL-precious about it.

projects.title: Microsoft Intune Migration from MaaS360
projects.summary: Migrated the entire device fleet off MaaS360 onto Microsoft Intune in 90 days with zero downtime and 100% enrollment. Eliminated a redundant MDM license stack while bringing endpoint compliance under the same identity and Conditional Access controls as everything else.

projects.title: ADP Workforce Now — First HRIS from Nothing
projects.summary: Implemented the organization's first HRIS — ADP Workforce Now replacing paper HR files and manual payroll. Data migrated, benefits onboarded, time and attendance digitized, ACA compliance automated, and the system wired into Entra ID for identity lifecycle.

projects.title: Network Infrastructure Overhaul
projects.summary: Replaced unmanaged consumer-grade network gear with enterprise WatchGuard NGFW, Ubiquiti UniFi switching, and Aruba wireless across all facilities. Full VLAN segmentation for clinical, admin, guest, and IoT traffic with 802.1X authentication on the wire.
